input.creative_direction: high-stakes reveal hook; brand gold dominant

meta.notes: The lead-in companion to subject_first_slot. Tests the inverse hierarchy rule (prefix must be QUIETER than its subject — small/serif/white/no-effect/null-accel even when copy_tone=energetic would pull a subject to bold-sans-gold-font-cycle). The structural check explicitly fires if a prefix placeholder comes back at 'large' or above; this fixture's 'small' is the canonical baseline.
